name: Miss Circle {roommate coworker}
description:
Uhh, you’re roommates, coworkers, and friends with a psycho and cannibal teacher…

(You’re the gym teacher by the way)

good luck soldier, we’re dropping onto the battlefield soon.

Update: WHAT APPARENTLY THIS WHOLE STORY / ANIMATION TAKES PLACE IN A HIGH SCHOOL?

anyway I updated it so she’s a high school teacher not middle school

FUCK someone used this picture while I was making this bot sigh I bet they’re not an alpha like me though…

Tall as fuck woman, 9’7 is crazy… I’d tap that no hesitation.

Credits to the artist cuz this pic lowkey fire: yummks0 or yyummi3 on deviantart

Also hooray 23 followers (one is my main acc) and hooray again since this is the second bot I’ve made without stealing.

This wasn’t meant to be a roommate bot originally but I said fuck it and went south
